sprint.title: Export v2 (Production): DOCX (Content Model) + PPTX (Page → Slide) + Unified Export Quota
sprint.goal: Ship production-grade DOCX and PPTX exports using free-tier tooling and your existing data model: DOCX is generated from the story content model (editable text-first), and PPTX is generated from Studio pages (page → slide, editable). Reuse the existing overall export quota (no per-type quotas). Store artifacts in R2 and provide reliable downloads.
definitionOfDone: DOCX export produces an editable document: title page, chapter headings, paragraphs, images inline with captions/credits
PPTX export produces an editable slide deck: each Studio page maps to a slide with positioned text/images/shapes where possible
Export pipeline is idempotent and resilient: job states, retries, and clear user errors
Exports are stored as artifacts (R2) and downloadable with signed URLs
Unified monthly export quota applies across PDF/DOCX/PPTX (one counter)
Hidden pages are excluded by default (consistent with PDF policy)
Orientation is respected for PPTX slide sizes (portrait/landscape)
Automated tests cover mapping correctness and artifact generation without regressions

stackAssumptions.docxTooling: Node-based DOCX generation library (open source; no paid service)

renderInputs.docx: Story content model (chapters + answers + rich text plain extraction)
renderInputs.pptx: Studio doc model (pages + nodes with x/y/w/h + text/images)

stackAssumptions.quota: Existing unified quota from billing sprint (one counter for all export types)

backlog.title: Finalize export architecture v2: types, job states, artifact storage, unified quota integration

quota: Reuse existing unified monthly export counter (increment for any type)
Increment only on successful export completion (consistent with your policy)
constraints: All exports must be server-generated (no client-side generation)

acceptanceTests: Jobs can be created for pdf/docx/pptx
Quota check blocks when exceeded, regardless of type
Artifact records link correctly to jobs

backlog.title: DOCX export mapping spec (content model → Word structure)

mapping: Cover/title page: story title, subtitle, author name (optional), date
TOC: optional (v1 simple headings, or omit)
Each chapter: Heading 1 with chapter title
Body: paragraphs derived from ordered answers (or chapter compiled text)
Images: inline with max width (fit within margins), caption below
Credits: optional final section listing photo credits
richText: Use derived plain text for v1 (keeps DOCX stable).
If Tiptap is present, optionally support basic marks later; v1 can be plain text for reliability.
constraints: Editable-first: do not attempt pixel-perfect layout
Page size follows story preset (portrait/landscape optional later for DOCX; v1 use standard A4/Letter)

acceptanceTests: Spec covers all required sections and edge cases (missing images, empty chapters)
Ordering is deterministic

backlog.title: Implement DOCX generator (server-side) using OSS library + embed images from R2

implementation: Fetch story content model (chapters, answers, titles)
Fetch selected storybookPhotos (max 20) and map into chapters (simple v1: spread across chapters)
Embed images by downloading from R2 (server) and inserting into DOCX
Apply consistent styles: headings, body font, spacing, margins
constraints: Do not hotlink external image URLs
Guard against huge memory usage (stream images where possible)

acceptanceTests: DOCX opens in Word/Google Docs with correct structure
Images appear and are not broken
Output is editable

backlog.title: PPTX export mapping spec (Studio pages → slides; editable shapes)

mapping: Each Studio page becomes one slide
Text nodes become ppt text boxes at x/y/w/h
Image nodes/frames become slide images at x/y/w/h with crop/cover behavior
Basic shapes (rect, line) mapped where possible; complex effects ignored in v1
pageFiltering: Exclude hidden pages by default (match PDF policy)
constraints: Editable-first: use real PPT text boxes and images, not slide screenshots
Text measurement differences expected; prefer conservative text box sizing

acceptanceTests: Spec clearly maps common Studio node types
Landscape export generates wide slides

backlog.title: Implement PPTX generator using PptxGenJS (server-side) with coordinate transforms

implementation: Load Studio doc model (pages + nodes), filter hidden pages
Convert editor coordinates to PPT points (scaling based on page preset)
Add text boxes with style (font, size, color) as available
Add images by fetching from R2 (or cached urls) and inserting at positions; handle crop mode v1 as 'cover center'
Set slide layout size based on orientation preset
constraints: No rasterizing pages to images (except as fallback for unsupported nodes, optional P1)

acceptanceTests: PPTX opens in PowerPoint/Google Slides
Slides are editable (text selectable, images movable)
Orientation is correct

backlog.title: Export orchestration: enqueue jobs, run generators, upload artifacts to R2, return download links

steps: Run generator in action (or scheduled job if long-running)
Upload Buffer to R2 -> create artifact record
Mark job done and increment quota usage
constraints: Idempotent: if same job reruns, it should not create duplicate artifacts (use filename+hash or jobId-based keys)
Errors set job.status=error with stable errorCode

acceptanceTests: User can request DOCX and PPTX and receive downloadable artifacts
Quota increments only on successful completion
Failures are recoverable via retry

backlog.title: Studio export UI: add DOCX and PPTX to Export menu + artifacts list/history

ui: Export menu includes: PDF, DOCX, PPTX
Artifacts history panel: last N exports with type/date
constraints: If quota exceeded: show upgrade modal (existing Stripe flow)

acceptanceTests: Export DOCX/PPTX can be initiated and shows progress
Downloads work and history lists artifacts

backlog.title: Quality & compatibility: test on Word/Google Docs and PowerPoint/Google Slides + fix common issues

manualMatrix: DOCX: Microsoft Word desktop, Word online, Google Docs import
PPTX: Microsoft PowerPoint desktop, PowerPoint online, Google Slides import
qualityChecks: Text readable and not clipped excessively

acceptanceTests: DOCX and PPTX open in at least 2 major viewers each without corruption
Known limitations documented

backlog.title: Automated tests: mapping + artifact generation + quota integration

tests: Unit: PPTX coordinate mapping for portrait/landscape
Integration: export job lifecycle creates artifact and increments unified quota
Integration: hidden pages filtered from PPTX
constraints: Do not store large binary fixtures in repo; generate small sample docs in tests

acceptanceTests: At least 6 tests added and passing
No regressions to existing PDF export

notes: DOCX is generated from the content model for maximum editability and robustness (not pixel-perfect).
PPTX is generated from Studio pages (page → slide) to support presentations with editable elements.
All tooling is open-source / self-hosted generation (no paid conversion services), aligning with a free-tier requirement.
